assertions.title: Business events tab loads with paginated data

steps.expected: Page loads with Business Events tab active
steps.observed: Page loaded with Business Events tab active, heading 'Audit Trail' and subtitle visible
GET /api/v1/admin/audit/events?page=0&size=20 returned 200 (verified via performance entries)

steps.expected: Columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Module, Status
steps.observed: DataTable shows exactly those 6 columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Module, Status

steps.expected: Table shows data rows with values
steps.observed: 20 rows visible with events like LOGIN_SUCCESS, USER_DELETED, PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED, USER_CREATED, etc.
Pagination shows '1 / 6' and '1–20 of 117' (total varies slightly with concurrent logins)
No console errors detected

assertions.title: Accounting tab loads or shows graceful error

steps.expected: Accounting tab activates, API call fires
steps.observed: Clicked Accounting tab, tab activated
GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/events?page=0&size=20 returned 200 (verified via performance entries)

steps.expected: Table with accounting entries on success
steps.observed: DataTable shows 14 rows of accounting entries with columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Reference, Sensitive. Entries include JOURNAL_ENTRY#1 through JOURNAL_ENTRY#14 with system actor and MOCK-SALE/MOCK-COGS/MOCK-PO references.
Page renders cleanly with data, pagination shows '1 / 1' and '1–14 of 14'
Page 1 shows '1 / 6', previous button disabled, next button enabled

steps.expected: Navigate to page 2, data changes, page indicator updates
steps.observed: Page 2 shows '2 / 6', '21–40 of 118', different data rows (ACCESS_DENIED events visible). Previous button now enabled.

steps.expected: Navigate back to page 1, previous button disabled again
steps.observed: Returned to page 1 showing '1 / 6', '1–20 of 118', previous button disabled

steps.expected: On last page, next button disabled
steps.observed: Navigated to last page (7 / 7), showing '121–125 of 125'. Previous button enabled, next button disabled.

steps.action: Verify API calls for all pages
steps.expected: Each page change fires API call with correct page param
steps.observed: API calls verified: page=0 through page=6 all returned 200

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/admin/audit/events?page=0&size=20 → 200, page=1 → 200, page=2 → 200, page=3 → 200, page=4 → 200, page=5 → 200, page=6 → 200

steps.observed: Initial state: '1–20 of 127' total events

steps.action: Type actor identifier in filter input
steps.expected: After debounce, API re-fires with actor param
steps.observed: Typed 'val-e2e-1774937474@test.com' in filter. API fired with actor param: GET /api/v1/admin/audit/events?actor=val-e2e-1774937474@test.com&page=0&size=20 → 200

steps.action: Verify filtered results show only matching events
steps.observed: Results narrowed to '1–3 of 3'. All 3 visible rows have actor 'val-e2e-1774937474@test.com' with PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED actions.

steps.action: Clear filter to restore all events
steps.observed: Cleared filter input. After debounce, results restored to '1–20 of 127'
Set viewport to 375x812. Page re-rendered with card-based mobile layout.

steps.action: Verify DataTable uses mobile card renderer
steps.observed: DataTable switched to card renderer — each event shows as a card with action code (e.g., USER_CREATED, LOGIN_SUCCESS), status text (SUCCESS/FAILURE), actor email, and timestamp.
Textbox 'Filter by actor...' visible at ref @e3
Refresh button visible at ref @e4
scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375 — no horizontal overflow

evidence.network: N/A (no additional API calls for viewport change)

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Business Events tab loads with paginated data, Accounting tab loads successfully with journal entry data, pagination works correctly (next/previous buttons enable/disable properly, data changes between pages), actor filter narrows results correctly with API actor param, and responsive layout at 375px uses card renderer with no horizontal overflow.
